privacy.title: 隐私设置
privacy.profileInfoSharingDesc: Choose what information you'd 点赞 to 分享 with potential employers
privacy.matchingImpactDesc: Sharing 更少 information reduces the likelihood of 发现 the perfect 匹配. Our AI uses your complete 个人资料 to 查找 商机 that align with your 目标 and 专业能力.
privacy.shareCurrentTitle: 分享 当前 标题
privacy.shareLinkedIn: 分享 LinkedIn 个人资料
privacy.shareCareerPreferences: 分享 职业 偏好设置
privacy.companyBlocklistDesc: Ensure complete discretion - these 公司 won't see your 个人资料 or 商机
privacy.noBlockedCompanies: No 公司 已屏蔽 yet. 添加 公司 to maintain your 隐私.
privacy.blockedCompaniesNote: Note: 已屏蔽 公司 will not be able to 查看 your 个人资料, 联系人 you, or see that you've applied to their 商机. Your information remains completely confidential.
privacy.dataManagementDesc: 导出 or 删除 your data
privacy.downloadDataDesc: 下载 全部 your data in a portable 格式化
privacy.deleteAccountDesc: 永久删除 your 账户 and 全部 data
